text:
the Reform Program further clarifies that CDB will become a multi-
                                                                                                                    purpose bank with credit and investment functions. Thus, it can be
                                                                                                                    seen that the reform of CDB is very different from that of other state-
                                                                                                                    owned banks including ICBC, ABC, BOC and CCB. Aiming to
                                                                                                                    establish a development financial institution that takes shape of a
                                                                                                                    commercial bank, the reform of CDB is a new exploration in China’s
                                                                                                                    financial system reform and also an energetic initiative of accelerat-
                                                                                                                    ing the modernization process. The reform and development of CDB is an important component
                                                                                                                    of China’s long- and mid-term development strategy. Considering
                                                                                                                    the complex domestic and international situations and the tasks
                                                                                                                    China is facing, the reform and development of CDB need to concen-
                                                                                                                    trate on serving the national development strategy, reflect the
                                                                                                                    requirements of financial ecological diversity and further take full
                                                                                                                    advantage of development-oriented finance to stand out in interna-
                                                                                                                    tional competition.
